task_completion.description: Navigate to the 'SALESQ1' campaign settings in the Vicidial admin panel.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Vicidial admin interface is visible in a web browser, showing the Campaign settings page with 'SALESQ1' selected or displayed as the active campaign.

task_completion.description: Access the Pause Codes configuration section for the campaign.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Pause Codes' or 'Custom Pause Codes' sub-menu/configuration screen is open for the SALESQ1 campaign.

task_completion.description: Configure the BREAK and LUNCH pause codes with Billable set to NO.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The pause codes list or entry form shows 'BREAK' (Scheduled Break) and 'LUNCH' (Lunch Break) added, with the 'Billable' field or column explicitly set to 'NO'.

task_completion.description: Configure the TRAIN and COACH pause codes with Billable set to YES.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The pause codes list or entry form shows 'TRAIN' (Skills Training) and 'COACH' (Supervisor Coaching) added, with the 'Billable' field or column explicitly set to 'YES'.

task_completion.description: Configure the TECH and ADMIN pause codes with Billable set to HALF.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The pause codes list or entry form shows 'TECH' (Technical Issue) and 'ADMIN' (Administrative Work) added, with the 'Billable' field or column explicitly set to 'HALF'.

integrity.description: The agent used the Vicidial web interface to configure the codes.
integrity.visual_evidence: A web browser is used to interact with the Vicidial admin panel. There should be no terminal windows open executing MySQL queries or curl commands to bypass the UI.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the actual application forms.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the agent typing into the pause code input fields, selecting dropdowns, and clicking save/submit buttons within the Vicidial interface, rather than just viewing a text file.

integrity.description: The agent did not use the browser developer console to inject the configuration.
integrity.visual_evidence: The browser's developer tools (Console, Network tab) are not open and being used to execute JavaScript or API requests to complete the task.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Target Campaign ID: SALESQ1. Expected Pause Codes and Billable Statuses: 1) BREAK (Scheduled Break) -> NO, 2) LUNCH (Lunch Break) -> NO, 3) TRAIN (Skills Training) -> YES, 4) COACH (Supervisor Coaching) -> YES, 5) TECH (Technical Issue) -> HALF, 6) ADMIN (Administrative Work) -> HALF.
